metadata.description: Personal Claude Code toolkit — skills, hooks, and agents for full-stack development

plugins.name: audit-code
plugins.description: Production readiness audit — security, error handling, auth, Docker, code quality

plugins.name: audit-docs
plugins.description: Documentation audit — staleness, redundancy, broken references, bloat

plugins.name: slim-cli
plugins.description: Puts CLI output on a diet — rewrites verbose commands to compact versions to save tokens

plugins.name: review-pr
plugins.description: PR review against project standards — code quality, security, tests, patterns
